a_image.alt: Clean UI style mood board — Flat Design · Clean Interface

sections.a_eyebrow: Flat Design · Minimal · Whitespace · Professional · Elegant
sections.a_description: Pure whitespace, obsessive alignment, and an almost invisible interface that lets content do all the talking — Clean UI is minimalism distilled to its functional essence. There are no decorative elements, no accent colors demanding attention, just black text on white backgrounds with enough spacing to make every word feel important and every click target obvious.

This reductionist style powers the world's most-used design tools, developer platforms, and productivity applications. You'll see it on Vercel, Linear, Notion, and countless SaaS dashboards — anywhere that serves power users who need to focus on content without visual distraction, and where the interface itself aspires to complete transparency.

a_image_cover.alt: Clean UI style use case illustration
Clean UI style use case illustration
Clean UI style use case illustration

sections.a_description: The pristine, whitespace-driven aesthetic of clean UI design — maximum clarity, zero visual noise, and an obsessive attention to spacing and alignment. Background: pure white (#ffffff). The .inner panel has a barely-there gray background (#fafafa) with a 1px border (#eaeaea) and 8px border-radius — so subtle it almost disappears, letting content breathe. Colors: neutral black (#111111) as the primary accent — no decorative color, just pure contrast and hierarchy through typography. Near-black (#111111) for headings, medium gray (#666666) for body text. The aesthetic is reduction taken to its logical endpoint — every pixel justified, every element essential. Set in Inter — the definitive clean UI font, with perfect metrics and optical sizing. Heading at weight 600, 24px, line-height 1.4, letter-spacing -0.3px, color #111111. Eyebrow at weight 500, 11px, uppercase, 2px letter-spacing, color #666666. Body at weight 400, 15px, line-height 1.7, color #666666. Buttons: primary — black (#111111), white text, 6px border-radius. Secondary: transparent, black border. Alternatives: Geist (Vercel system), SF Pro (Apple system).
